# flashduty_route_history (Data Source)

Retrieves route history for a shared alert integration from Flashduty.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get route history by integration ID
data "flashduty_route_history" "main" {
  integration_id = 5592304204454
}

# Use the route history data
output "history_count" {
  value = length(data.flashduty_route_history.main.items)
}

output "latest_version" {
  value = length(data.flashduty_route_history.main.items) > 0 ? data.flashduty_route_history.main.items[0].version : 0
}

# Get all versions
output "all_versions" {
  value = [for item in data.flashduty_route_history.main.items : item.version]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `integration_id` (Number) The ID of the shared alert integration.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) List of route history items. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `cases` (Attributes List) Conditional routing rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--cases))
- `default` (Attributes) Default routing configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--default))
- `sections` (Attributes List) Section dividers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--sections))
- `updated_at` (Number) The timestamp when updated.
- `updated_by` (Number) The user ID who updated.
- `version` (Number) The version number.

<a id="nestedatt--items--cases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.cases`

Read-Only:

- `channel_ids` (List of Number) Target channel IDs.
- `fallthrough` (Boolean) Whether to continue matching.
- `if` (Attributes List) Filter conditions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--cases--if))
- `name_mapping_label` (String) Label key for name mapping mode.
- `routing_mode` (String) Routing mode.

<a id="nestedatt--items--cases--if"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.cases.if`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The attribute or label key.
- `oper` (String) The operator.
- `vals` (List of String) The values to match.



<a id="nestedatt--items--default"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.default`

Read-Only:

- `channel_ids` (List of Number) Default target channel IDs.


<a id="nestedatt--items--sections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.sections`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Section name.
- `position` (Number) Position.
